allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\MIKE-PC\\Downloads" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object {$_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-7\)} | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\MIKE-PC\\Downloads" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name, LastWriteTime, @{n='SizeKB';e={[int]\($_.Length/1KB\)}})

PowerShell($d = "C:\\Users\\MIKE-PC\\Downloads"; \(Get-ChildItem $d -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count; Get-ChildItem $d -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 | Out-String)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\MIKE-PC\\Downloads" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LastWriteTime -gt \(Get-Date\).AddDays\(-30\) -and \($_.Extension -in '.jpeg','.jpg','.png','.heic'\) } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 Name, LastWriteTime, @{n='MB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\MIKE-PC\\Downloads" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match '^\\.\(jpeg|jpg|png|heic\)$' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.LastWriteTime.ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm'\)\) $\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)\)MB $\($_.Name\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\MIKE-PC\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match '^\\.\(jpeg|jpg|png|heic\)$' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.LastWriteTime.ToString\('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'\)\) $\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,2\)\)MB $\($_.FullName\)" })
